info.description: REST API for CerberOS memory, chat, personal info, system event, vault, and agent execution services.
info.title: Memory Service API

get.description: Fetches and returns the chronological log of an agent's work for a specific taskId

post.description: Creates a new task execution log for an agent

get.description: Fetches and returns the chronological log of an agent's work for a specific taskId

post.description: Creates a new task execution log for an agent

get.description: Retrieves a list of messages for a specific chat session

post.description: Creates a new message in a chat session

get.description: Retrieves conversation summaries for a specific user

post.description: Creates a new conversation for a specific user

get.description: Returns service health and database connectivity status
Retrieves orchestrator records by data_type and task/orchestrator filters

parameters.description: Use not_terminal to exclude terminal task states
parameters.name: state_filter

post.description: Creates or upserts one orchestrator record depending on data_type semantics

get.description: Retrieves the latest orchestrator record for a task and data_type
Retrieves all stored facts and chunks for a user

put.description: Updates a fact for a user with optimistic concurrency control

delete.description: Deletes a fact for a user

post.description: Archives an active fact for a user with an explicit archive reason
Creates a replacement fact and archives the previous active fact as superseded
Searches for relevant personal information and facts
Extracts and saves personal information from text
Creates a scheduled job for internal maintenance or external dispatch
Executes all active scheduled jobs whose next run time is due and records run history

get.description: Retrieves run history for a scheduled job
Retrieves a list of system event logs

post.description: Creates a new system event log entry
Creates a new task for an existing conversation or creates a conversation first when none is provided

get.description: Retrieves a task and its conversation mapping for a specific user
Retrieves and decrypts a secret for a user

post.description: Saves a new encrypted secret for a user

put.description: Updates an encrypted secret for a user

delete.description: Deletes an encrypted secret for a user
